title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Extension System Mission
summary: A software platform team. The team needs a focused review skill with reliable triggers, references, scripts, tests, and safe failure behavior. Planned artifact: Deliver Tested Repository Review Skill with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.
Front-load use cases and trigger terms in a concise skill description.
Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""
